CREATE TABLE test_schema.test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100));
ALTER TABLE test_schema.test_table RENAME TO test_table_renamed;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_schema.foreign_table (foreign_id INT REFERENCES test_schema.test_table(id), description VARCHAR(255));
ALTER TABLE test_schema.foreign_table RENAME TO foreign_table_renamed;
CREATE VIEW test_schema.test_view AS SELECT * FROM test_schema.test_table;
ALTER TABLE test_schema.test_table RENAME TO old_table_name WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_schema.test_view);
CREATE TABLE test_schema.index_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(255));
ALTER TABLE test_schema.index_table RENAME TO index_table_renamed;
CREATE FUNCTION test_schema.my_function() RETURNS VOID AS $$ BEGIN RETURN; END $$ LANGUAGE 'sql';
ALTER TABLE test_schema.index_table_renamed RENAME TO renamed_table_name WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = 'index_table_renamed');
ALTER TABLE test_schema.test_table_renamed RENAME TO test_table_renamed_final;
ALTER TABLE test_schema.test_table_renamed_final RENAME TO nullable_table_name IF EXISTS;
